title: M.Com Jobs 2026 – Guest Teacher
shortInfo: Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School Recruitment 2026 notification is out for 35 Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) vacancies. Eligible candidates with Bachelor’s, Master’s, B.Ed, CTET, and B.P.Ed qualifications can apply offline through the official application process before 10 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 35 PGT & TGT Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School Recruitment 2026 notification is out for 35 Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) vacancies. Eligible candidates with Bachelor’s, Master’s, B.Ed, CTET, and B.P.Ed qualifications can apply offline through the official application process before 10 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 50% marks + B.Ed, Bachelor's degree with 50% marks + B.Ed + CTET Paper II, B.P.Ed with 50% marks

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) posts is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Guest Teachers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 35 vacancies for Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) posts announced by Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for PGT posts?
faq.answer: For PGT posts, a Master's degree with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed degree are generally required, with specific subject requirements.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification for TGT posts?
faq.answer: For TGT posts, a Bachelor's degree with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed degree, along with CTET Paper II, are generally required.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Teacher posts will be on a pay per period basis.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Teacher posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School.

faq.question: What is the location of Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School?
faq.answer: Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110025.
